landing.heroTitle: Rental management & tax preparation for small landlords.
landing.heroCopy: The lightweight tool to manage 1 to 5 properties without the complexity of large real-estate software. Designed for independent landlords.
landing.featuresCopy: Focus on the essentials. Our interface is designed to be efficient, not decorative.
landing.featurePropertiesCopy: See the state of your rental portfolio at a glance. Photos, diagnostics and key dates centralized.
landing.featureRentCopy: No need to check your bank account every day. We mark payments received and alert you when rent is late.
landing.featureReceiptsCopy: Automatic receipt generation as soon as rent is received. Secure archiving for every lease.
landing.featureTaxCopy: Prepare tax season without stress. Export a detailed report of income and expenses ready for your accountant.
landing.pricingCopy: Start free, then choose the plan that matches your rental size.

free.name: Free
free.description: For trials or users managing one room.

solo.name: Solo
solo.description: For small landlords, LMNP owners and shared-flat landlords.

plus.name: Plus
plus.description: For owners with multiple rooms or several small properties.

portfolio.name: Portfolio
portfolio.description: For semi-professional landlords and small investors.

custom.name: Custom
custom.description: For large portfolios or special requirements.

landing.finalCopy: Join landlords who choose clarity over complexity.

tax.info: Exported data is intended to help with accounting preparation. Tax treatment must still be validated by your accountant.
tax.disclaimer: Categories are indicative and do not replace tax advice.

contact.title: Contact us
contact.intro: Our team is here to help you simplify rental management. Whether you have a technical question or need guidance on your tax file, we reply quickly.
contact.supportCopy: Our experts help you Monday to Friday, 9am to 6pm.
contact.faqCopy: More than 80% of questions are answered in our help center.

settings.title: Settings
settings.subtitle: Manage your account, subscription and security preferences.

status.checkoutSuccess: Payment received. The status may take a few seconds to sync through Stripe.
status.checkoutCancelled: Payment cancelled. Your data stays on the free plan.

subscription.currentPlanDescription: Your current plan controls limits for properties, tenants, documents, storage and photos.
subscription.stripePortalHint: Open the customer portal to view invoices or update payment details.

security.passwordHint: Your password should contain at least 12 characters, one uppercase letter and one number.
security.tip1: Use a password manager for unique keys.
security.tip2: Never share validation codes by SMS or email.
security.tip3: Regularly check active sessions for suspicious activity.

data.exportCopy: Download a complete archive of your properties, tenants and receipts. Useful for personal records or moving to another tool.
data.jsonCopy: Ideal for technical import or raw backup.
data.csvCopy: Ideal for analyzing numbers in Excel or Numbers.
data.deleteCopy: This action is irreversible. All your properties, leases, receipts and documents will be permanently deleted from our servers.
data.legalDocumentsCopy: Kept according to your tax archiving needs.
data.receiptsInvoicesCopy: Available while your account is active.
data.cookiesTrackingCopy: Limited to what is strictly necessary for session and security.
data.storageCurrentPlan: Your current plan allows storing up to {value} of scanned documents.

cookie.notice: Loyelio only uses cookies required for account functionality. Payment and authentication tools may set their own cookies.

errors.serverCopy: A server error occurred. You can try again or return to the dashboard.
errors.notFoundCopy: This page does not exist or you no longer have access to this resource.

privacy.title: Privacy policy
privacy.collectedCopy: Loyelio collects account information, properties, tenants, leases, rents, expenses and documents that you voluntarily add to your workspace.
privacy.usageCopy: This data is used to provide the service, secure your account, generate exports and improve the product experience. Payments are processed by Stripe.
privacy.processorsCopy: The service relies on Supabase for authentication, database and storage, Stripe for billing, and Vercel for hosting.
privacy.rightsCopy: You can request access, correction or deletion of your data. Accounting or legal obligations may require limited retention of some information.
privacy.contactCopy: For any request related to personal data, contact

terms.title: Terms of use
terms.serviceCopy: Loyelio provides an indicative rental, document and tax tracking workspace for small landlords. The service does not replace an accountant, lawyer or tax advisor.
terms.accountCopy: You are responsible for the accuracy of the information entered and for keeping your account confidential. You must have the necessary rights to store added documents.
terms.billingCopy: Subscriptions and payments are managed by Stripe. Paid access is activated after payment confirmation by Stripe and may be suspended if payment fails or is cancelled.
terms.availabilityCopy: We make reasonable efforts to keep the service available, without guaranteeing total absence of interruption, error or data loss.
terms.contactCopy: For any question about the service, contact
